LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GARY YOUNG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF RULING ON MOTION TO STRIKE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR # 2542 =(301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF STEVENSON STREET PARTNERS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS AN ISSUE AS TO PLAINTIFF'S ENTITLEMENT TO RENT IN LIGHT OF THE FACT THAT THE OCCUPANCY IS ILLEGAL. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G).
